sentence: El cielo no está claro hoy.
ipa: el ˈsjelo ˈno eˈsta ˈklaɾo ˈoi
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Seseo merges ⟨ci⟩ to [s] 'sjelo' (no [θ]); Sevilla-Cadiz-Huelva innovative core (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuarenta euros.
ipa: ˈestoh saˈpatoh ˈkwestaŋ kwaˈɾenta ˈewɾoh
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Seseo ⟨z⟩ [s] 'sapatoh'; coda/final -s aspirate to [h]; tonic Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Los dos niños corren mucho.
ipa: loh ˈdoh ˈniɲoh ˈkoreŋ ˈmutʃo
gloss_en: The two children run a lot.
notes: Final -n velarises to [ŋ] 'koreŋ'; coda -s aspiration 'loh doh'; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Mi hermano vive cerca de la plaza.
ipa: mi eˈɾmano ˈbiβe ˈseɾka de la ˈplasa
gloss_en: My brother lives near the square.
notes: Seseo ⟨ce⟩/⟨za⟩ [s] 'serka','plasa' (no [θ]) (hualde2005).

sentence: Coge las llaves y ven aquí.
ipa: ˈkoxe lah ˈʝaβeh i ˈbeŋ aˈki
gloss_en: Grab the keys and come here.
notes: Yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llaves'; coda -s of 'lah' aspirates (hualde2005).

sentence: Quieres pan con aceite de oliva?
ipa: ˈkjeɾeh ˈpaŋ koŋ aˈsejte de oˈliβa
gloss_en: Do you want bread with olive oil?
notes: Final -n velarises 'paŋ koŋ'; seseo ⟨ce⟩ [s] 'aceite'; tonic Ĕ>ie 'quieres' (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Dónde has puesto la muchacha las tazas?
ipa: ˈdonde ˈah ˈpwesto la muˈtʃatʃa lah ˈtasah
gloss_en: Where did the girl put the cups?
notes: ⟨ch⟩ stays [tʃ] 'mutʃatʃa' (deaffrication is a secondary Cadiz-Sevilla variant); coda -s aspiration; seseo ⟨za⟩ [s] (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Cuántas personas vienen a cenar?
ipa: ˈkuantah peˈɾsonah ˈbjeneŋ a seˈnaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Tonic Ĕ>ie 'vienen'; seseo ⟨ce⟩ [s] 'senar'; coda -s aspirates 'personas' (hualde2005).

sentence: Si yo pudiera, compraría aquella casa.
ipa: si ˈʝo puˈðjeɾa kompɾaˈɾia aˈkeʝa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Yeismo ⟨y⟩/⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'yo','aquella'; conditional register (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: Ayer compré cinco kilos de cerezas.
ipa: aˈʝeɾ koˈmpɾe ˈsinko ˈkiloh de seˈɾesah
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Seseo ⟨c⟩/⟨z⟩ [s] 'sinko','seresah'; final -s aspirates to [h] (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: El año que viene viajaré a Cádiz.
ipa: el ˈaɲo ke ˈbjene bjaxaˈɾe a ˈkaðis
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Cadiz.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'año'; velar ⟨j⟩ weakens toward [h] 'biahaɾe'; seseo ⟨z⟩ final [h] (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Llámame cuando llegues a casa.
ipa: ˈʝamame ˈkwando ˈʝeɡeh a ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Word-initial ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llámame','llegues'; sandhi elision 'llegues a' (hualde2005).

sentence: Buenas tardes, dame las gracias.
ipa: ˈbwenah ˈtaɾdeh ˈdame lah ˈɡɾasjah
gloss_en: Good afternoon, give me thanks.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>ue 'buenas'; seseo ⟨c⟩ [s] 'gracias'; coda -s aspiration 'lah',final [h] (hualde2005).

sentence: Más vale pájaro en mano que ciento volando.
ipa: ˈmah ˈbale ˈpaxaɾo eŋ ˈmano ke ˈsjento boˈlando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Seseo ⟨ci⟩ [s] with Ĕ>ie 'ciento'; final -s 'mah' aspirates; velar ⟨j⟩ weakens 'pahaɾo' (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: El perro corre por la orilla del río.
ipa: el ˈpero ˈkore poɾ la oˈɾiʝa del ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill/tap contrast ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'perro','corre' vs initial [r] 'río'; yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'orilla' (hualde2005).

sentence: La ciudad de Sevilla es muy grande.
ipa: la sjuˈða de seˈβiʝa ˈeh ˈmui ˈɡɾande
gloss_en: The city of Seville is very big.
notes: Seseo ⟨ci⟩ [s] 'siuða' with intervocalic -d- lenition; yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'Sevilla' (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Aquella villa amarilla brilla bajo la lluvia.
ipa: aˈkeʝa ˈbiʝa amaˈɾiʝa ˈbɾiʝa ˈbaxo la ˈʝuβja
gloss_en: That yellow villa shines in the rain.
notes: Dense yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'aquella','villa','amarilla','brilla','lluvia'; velar ⟨j⟩ weakens 'baho' (hualde2005).

sentence: No creo que llueva sobre aquellos cerros.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾeo ke ˈʝweβa ˈsobɾe aˈkeʝoh ˈseroh
gloss_en: I do not think it will rain over those hills.
notes: Yeismo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] with Ŏ>ue 'llueva'; seseo ⟨ce⟩ [s] and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'serroh'; final -s aspirates (hualde2005, penny2002).

sentence: Un vaso de vino con los amigos.
ipa: uŋ ˈbaso de ˈbino koŋ loh aˈmiɣoh
gloss_en: A glass of wine with friends.
notes: Final -n velarises 'uŋ'; coda -s aspiration 'loh amigoh'; seseo has no ⟨c z⟩ here (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).

sentence: Compramos doce naranjas en el mercado.
ipa: koˈmpɾamoh ˈdose naˈɾanxah eŋ el meˈɾkaðo
gloss_en: We bought twelve oranges at the market.
notes: Seseo ⟨ce⟩ [s] 'dose'; coda -s aspiration 'compɾamoh','naɾanhah'; velar ⟨j⟩ weakens (hualde2005, zamora_vicente1960).
